# 🤝 Contributing to Haramaya Gym

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Haramaya Gym! This document provides guidelines and information for contributors.

## 📋 How to Contribute

### 🐛 Reporting Bugs

1. 🔍 Check existing [issues](https://github.com/gemachistesfaye/Haramaya-Gym/issues) to avoid duplicates
2. 📝 Create a new issue with a clear title and description
3. 📋 Include steps to reproduce the bug
4. 💻 Mention your browser and OS

### 💡 Suggesting Features

1. 📋 Open an issue with the label "feature request"
2. 📝 Describe the feature and its use case
3. 🎯 Explain why it would benefit the project

### 🔀 Pull Requests

1. 🍴 Fork the repository
2. 🌿 Create a feature branch: `git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name`
3. ✏️ Make your changes
4. ✅ Test thoroughly
5. 💾 Commit with a clear message: `git commit -m "Add: description of feature"`
6. 📤 Push to your branch: `git push origin feature/your-feature-name`
7. 🔀 Open a Pull Request

## 🛠️ Development Setup

### 📋 Prerequisites
- 📦 Node.js 18+
- 📦 npm or yarn

### 📥 Installation
```bash
git clone https://github.com/gemachistesfaye/Haramaya-Gym.git
cd Haramaya-Gym
npm install
```

### 🏃 Development Server
```bash
npm run dev
```

### 🔨 Build
```bash
npm run build
```

## 📝 Code Style

- 🔷 Use TypeScript for all components
- 📋 Follow existing code patterns and naming conventions
- 🎨 Use Tailwind CSS for styling
- 🧩 Use shadcn/ui components when available
- ✂️ Keep components small and focused

## 💬 Commit Messages

Use clear, descriptive commit messages:
- ➕ `Add:` for new features
- 🐛 `Fix:` for bug fixes
- 🔄 `Update:` for improvements
- ❌ `Remove:` for deletions
- ♻️ `Refactor:` for code restructuring

## 📁 Project Structure

```
src/
  components/     # 🧩 Reusable UI components
  pages/          # 📄 Page components
  data/           # 📊 Static data
  assets/         # 🖼️ Images and media
```

## ❓ Need Help?

- 📋 Open an issue
- 📧 Contact: gemachistesfaye36@gmail.com

Thank you for contributing! 🙏
